warning: Experimental BurnLens portfolio evidence. Not official wildfire information. Not emergency guidance. Not evacuation, routing, tactical, or incident-command support. Official sources govern.
decision_summary: Select neither route. McKenzie HUC8 NWI and Milli 0843 CS both remain deferred because required rights and evidence gates have not passed.

blocking_reasons: The exact asset-specific local retention/processing and derived-publication rights remain unknown.
Archive member/project provenance, notices, mapping projects, imagery dates, and transformations remain unopened.
Project dates, scale, status, structure, coverage, geometry, Petes relationship, and scientific fitness remain unknown.
Three exploratory failed attempts lack one or more exact request locator or observation-time fields; those trace gaps are retained and not reconstructed.
The exact future Milli BAER, MTBS, and RAVG archive retention, processing, and derived-publication rights remain unknown.
The current terms attempts lack complete no-redirect, bounded-request, timestamp, and response-identity trace for every observation.
Current event, boundary, Portal, STAC, OData, provenance, acquisition cost, and integrity identities were not refreshed after the stop.
Complete-boundary multi-tile support, seam/grid behavior, local quality, registration, and both-class evidence remain unproved.

comparison.mckenzie: Approximate wetlands/deepwater context and conservative exclusion for Petes Lake only.
comparison.milli: Prospective Sentinel optical plus program-limited BAER, MTBS, and RAVG reference evidence.

comparison.mckenzie: Local retention, processing, and derived-publication rights remain unknown; raw redistribution blocked.
comparison.milli: Sentinel grant is supportable in principle; exact future BAER/MTBS/RAVG delivery rights remain unknown.

comparison.mckenzie: Package members, project dates, scale, coverage, omissions, and Petes relationship are unopened.
comparison.milli: Complete-boundary union, seams, grids, cloud/snow, registration, and both-class evidence are unproved.

comparison.mckenzie: Same Petes event; adds no independent event and cannot establish either class.
comparison.milli: Historically separate by 61.035 km, but current event/time/geography grouping was not refreshed.

comparison.mckenzie: Zero bytes; prospective one 28,966,292-byte ZIP through a new controlled intake.
comparison.milli: Zero bytes; prospective multi-tile Sentinel plus three program-source transactions.

comparison.mckenzie: Public metadata only; future archive remains untrusted and must screen notices, attributes, contacts, and logos.
comparison.milli: Public metadata only; future provider archives and queue/email delivery details remain private and untrusted.

comparison.mckenzie: Strong live asset HEAD identity, but member provenance and incomplete failed-attempt trace block reproduction.
comparison.milli: Historical planning snapshot only; current source roster stopped and the legacy vertex-only predicate is insufficient.

comparison.mckenzie: Known prospective body: 28.97 MB (27.62 MiB), one ZIP; no fee/account observed at metadata stage.
comparison.milli: Higher and unquantified; exact Sentinel roster, OData sizes, and program-delivery transactions were not refreshed.

comparison.mckenzie: Could improve exclusions but cannot provide burned plus affirmative-background cores or complete Petes.
comparison.milli: Higher theoretical sixth-event value, but no class, unknown ring, owner review, or non-owner promotion gate exists.

comparison.mckenzie: Shows disciplined source precedence and honest exclusion-context limits.
comparison.milli: Could show cross-event transfer and seam handling; current unresolved complexity outweighs evidence value.

portfolio_narrative: The portfolio-strengthening result is disciplined refusal: BurnLens identifies the next source weakness, tests the smallest legal and evidentiary route, retains failures, and does not turn available metadata into a sixth event or a dataset.
reconsideration: Neither route is permanently rejected. Reconsideration requires a new issue and immutable run, stronger exact rights evidence, fresh source identities, and every applicable scientific and custody gate.
attribution: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service National Wetlands Inventory
Monitoring Trends in Burn Severity Project (U.S. Geological Survey and USDA Forest Service)
Copernicus Sentinel programme / European Union; no Sentinel pixels are reproduced here
